chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُؤْمِنِ وَ عَلَامَاتِهِ وَ صِفَاتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 99 –The Momin, and his signs, and his description

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/237)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/237)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ سَرَّتْهُ حَسَنَتُهُ وَ سَاءَتْهُ سَيِّئَتُهُ فَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Al Qasim Bin Gurwa, from Abu Al Abbas who said,
‘Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘The one whose good deeds delight him, and his evil deeds disgust him, so he is a Momin’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from al-Qasim ibn ‘Urwah from abu al-‘Abbas who has said that abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said the following: “Whoever enjoys a virtuous deed and is disgusted with a sin is a believer.”
